title: Swiss Winter Wonderland — 5 Days
subtitle: Skiing, Christmas markets, thermal baths, and snowy peaks
description: Experience Switzerland at its most magical. This winter itinerary combines world-class skiing in Zermatt, relaxing thermal baths, atmospheric Christmas markets, and snow-covered Alpine landscapes.

itinerary.title: Arrive in Zermatt
itinerary.description: Arrive in car-free Zermatt. Evening stroll through the village with Matterhorn views. Visit the Matterhorn Museum for the story of the first ascent.
itinerary.tip: Zermatt has snow from November to May

itinerary.title: Skiing & Matterhorn Glacier Paradise
itinerary.description: Full day on Zermatt's 360km of pistes — the largest ski area in Switzerland. Non-skiers: take the cable car to Matterhorn Glacier Paradise (3,883m).

itinerary.title: Leukerbad Thermal Baths
itinerary.description: Soak in Europe's largest alpine thermal bath complex. Walliser Alpentherme and Leukerbad Therme offer warm pools surrounded by snow-covered peaks.

itinerary.title: Bern Christmas Market
itinerary.description: Bern's Christmas market fills the old town with 100+ wooden chalets selling crafts, mulled wine, and Swiss treats. The UNESCO backdrop makes it magical.

itinerary.title: Frozen Oeschinensee & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit the frozen UNESCO lake at Oeschinensee. Toboggan run, winter hiking, and — when conditions allow — natural ice skating on the frozen surface.
